docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHANG MAY AS TO DEFENDANT WOO DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOO DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG MAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO DAVID $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,028.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WOO DAVID HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-19-1991, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG MAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOO DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
